en_title: The Elder Scrolls Online Has Reportedly Lost 'As Much as Half' of Its Development Team as Its Roadmap Is Being Re-Evaluated
cn_title: 《上古卷轴OL》开发团队据称最多裁掉一半
subtitle: 内容路线图正在重新评估
opus_summary: 据报道，《上古卷轴OL》开发团队可能已有多达一半成员被裁。ZeniMax Online Studios正重新评估游戏路线图，玩家也开始担忧这款MMORPG未来的支持力度。

paragraphs.en: "As much as half" of the team working on The Elder Scrolls Online has been laid off, according to a report from Kotaku , leading many to wonder how the game will continue.
paragraphs.cn: 据Kotaku报道，负责《上古卷轴OL》的团队已有「多达一半」成员被裁，这让许多人开始怀疑这款游戏将如何继续运营。

paragraphs.en: Earlier today, Microsoft began carrying out its "reset" of the Xbox brand by . Although no studios are shutting down, many are being offloaded from Xbox and being sold to other companies or given the chance to go independent. Bethesda is also expected to focus on a small handful of franchises , such as Fallout and The Elder Scrolls, going forward.
paragraphs.cn: 今天早些时候，微软开始执行对XBOX品牌的「重置」。虽然没有工作室被关闭，但许多工作室正在被从XBOX体系中剥离，出售给其他公司，或获得独立运营的机会。贝塞斯达未来预计也会专注于少数几个系列，例如《辐射》和《上古卷轴》。

paragraphs.en: Unfortunately, one of the studios hit the hardest by the rest appears to be ZeniMax Online Studios, though the total number of those impacted is unknown. This isn't the first time this has happened, as Xbox hit ZOS hard last year and canceled a sci-fi MMO at the studio .
paragraphs.cn: 不幸的是，受这次重组打击最严重的工作室之一似乎是ZeniMax Online Studios，不过受影响总人数尚不清楚。这并不是第一次发生类似情况，XBOX去年也曾重创ZOS，并取消了该工作室的一款科幻MMO。

paragraphs.en: Kotaku reported that sources from ZeniMax have expressed uncertainty on how The Elder Scrolls Online could continue on after such a massive blow. The team seems to be reckoning with this publicly, as community manager Jessica Folsom took to the ESO forums to tell players that the game's roadmap is "shifting" and they will need time to re-evaluate it before sharing a new plan.
paragraphs.cn: Kotaku报道称，来自ZeniMax的消息人士对《上古卷轴OL》在遭受如此巨大打击后如何继续运营表达了不确定。这支团队似乎也在公开面对这一现实，社区经理Jessica Folsom在ESO论坛告诉玩家，游戏路线图正在「变化」，团队需要时间重新评估，之后才会分享新计划。

paragraphs.en: "Looking beyond Season One, the roadmaps we previously shared will be shifting," said Folsom. "We want to take the time to evaluate the work in front of us and then lock down an updated schedule. While we'd love to share a concrete details today, stepping back to get our plans straight will let us come back to you with a clear timeline."
paragraphs.cn: Folsom表示：「展望第一赛季之后，我们此前分享的路线图将会发生变化。我们希望花时间评估眼前的工作，然后确定更新后的日程。虽然我们很想今天就分享具体细节，但后退一步理清计划，会让我们能够带着清晰时间线再回到大家面前。」

paragraphs.en: With such a massive reduction to ESO's development team, many players are fearing the worst for the game's future. It seems like the game will remain playable, but how much support will it get? That's the big question today. The Elder Scrolls Online recently moved away from "Chapters" and big expansions to embrace seasonal content, which already suggested the game may be scaling down.
paragraphs.cn: 随着ESO开发团队大幅缩减，许多玩家开始对游戏未来做最坏打算。游戏看起来仍会保持可玩，但它会获得多少支持？这是今天最大的问题。《上古卷轴OL》最近已经从「章节」和大型扩展转向赛季内容，这本身就已经暗示游戏规模可能正在收缩。

paragraphs.en: Now, it seems hard for some players to even imagine a future for ESO.
paragraphs.cn: 现在，对一些玩家来说，甚至很难想象ESO还有怎样的未来。

paragraphs.en: "Difficult to read this as anything other than an intention to wind down the game," said . , noting that this move will likely push fans away from the game and result in its definite demise: "MMORPGs can't continue if the players think the game will not grow in the future. No one wants to invest the time MMORPGs demand to a game that may not exist in 5 years. It will be like a death spiral."
paragraphs.cn: 有人表示：「很难不把这解读为有意让游戏逐步收缩。」还有人指出，这一举动很可能会把粉丝推离游戏，并导致它走向明确的消亡：「如果玩家认为游戏未来不会成长，MMORPG就无法继续。没人愿意把MMORPG所要求的时间投入到一款5年后可能不存在的游戏里。它会像死亡螺旋一样。」

paragraphs.en: "I'm going to be honest, it's a near guarantee that ESO go into 'Maintenance Mode' within the next year or at least a low power mode where hardly any new content is released," . "They already reduced the amount of dungeons, expansion content and zones being released a little while ago, so expect even less now. Destiny 2 getting shit canned last month was needed because it got so bad so I didn't mind that much, but ESO still has so much to give."
paragraphs.cn: 另一名玩家说：「老实讲，几乎可以肯定ESO会在明年进入‘维护模式’，或者至少进入几乎不再发布新内容的低功耗模式。他们前段时间已经减少了地下城、扩展内容和区域的发布数量，所以现在要预期更少。《命运2》上个月被砍支持是有必要的，因为它已经变得很糟，所以我倒没那么介意，但ESO还有太多东西可以给。」

paragraphs.en: Some fans looked to other titles to try and brace for what's next. "This is truly worrying news," . "Warhammer Online faced a similar fate. It start with half the team and the face of the team being laid off."
paragraphs.cn: 有些粉丝则拿其他游戏作为参照，试图为接下来可能发生的事做心理准备。有人说：「这真的是令人担忧的消息。《战锤Online》也遭遇过类似命运。一开始是半个团队和团队门面人物被裁。」

paragraphs.en: Some even began comparing the situation to what happened to Destiny. Earlier this summer, Bungie wound down support on Destiny 2 before laying off hundreds of developers . The game remains functional, but will no longer receive support. they jumped from Destiny to Elder Scrolls Online.
paragraphs.cn: 甚至有人开始把这种情况与《命运》发生的事相比。今年夏天早些时候，Bungie在裁掉数百名开发者之前，逐步结束了对《命运2》的支持。这款游戏仍可运行，但不会再获得支持。有玩家表示，自己正是从《命运》转向《上古卷轴OL》的。

paragraphs.en: "Noooo I just came to this game from Destiny. F--k me, man."
paragraphs.cn: 「不——我才刚从《命运》转到这款游戏。饶了我吧。」

paragraphs.en: Cade Onder is a freelancer for IGN's news team. He covers all things entertainment, including gaming, film, and more. You can find him on Twitter @Cade_Onder.
paragraphs.cn: Cade Onder是IGN新闻团队的自由撰稿人。他报道游戏、电影等各类娱乐内容。你可以在Twitter上通过@Cade_Onder找到他。
